label: 2026-04-17-no-control
description: Weaker no-Frost April 17 line: keep the early economy and side-lane answers, but refuse to buy Frost Fern and never stabilize lane 4. This is still a serious attempt at the board, but it should lose before clear because the control slot is wasted on raw damage while the lower lane collapses under mixed beetle/sniper pressure.

placements.note: Open with a center Thorn so the first lane-2 beetles are already under fire.
Early bank away from the center sniper lane so the first pulses arrive before wave 2.
Catch the first lane-1 Shard Mite before it slips past the wall column.
Mirror the lane-1 answer for the lane-3 Shard Mite.
Spend the Frost Fern slot on another Thorn Vine instead of control.
Backfill the top lane before the late wave-1 Shard Mite can cross the wall tile.
Late center Bramble follow-up, but with no Frost control and no lane-4 stabilization the run should still die before clear.
